query: Taylor-Calibrate complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Weight-Loss Startup Calibrate Faces Mountain of Patient Complaints and Refunds - Business Insider
results.content:
Kenyon also acknowledged that Calibrate patients were fed up with the time it takes staff to respond to their messages, and she said the startup is working to be more communicative.

"That's the piece that's really frustrating for members, and it's unacceptable, and we commit to fix it," she said.

She sent a mass email to members on August 21, the day of Insider's scheduled interview with her, apologizing for recent disruptions in access to medication and promising to start responding to members more quickly by the end of September. [...] Reflecting these problems, the app, launched in June, now has an average rating of 1.1 out of five stars in the Apple App Store.

A current employee said a round of layoffs in April might have contributed to the bungled app launch, since Calibrate had only "a skeleton crew" of engineers to fix the app's issues. Kenyon wrote in her statement to Insider that this characterization was inaccurate.

Kenyon said in the interview that the process of moving members and Calibrate staff from previous software to the new app's platform was "exceptionally broken," and cut off some patients' access to the app entirely for a period of time. She said the issues have been fixed. [...] Patients became frustrated because they were kept out of the loop while the team sought their insurance companies' approval for a prescription, five former employees said. When Calibrate did respond to members during this process, it often sent a generic message, because the employees who responded to members' questions had little insight into the status of prescriptions, two of the former employees said.

"It's not someone buying a mattress that can wait two weeks for a response to their message — it's someone who's having side effects. They need a response right away," the current employee said. "They deserve a response, they've paid for a program." Calibrate leaders "just don't wanna prioritize that," she continued.

results.title: ‎Calibrate - Metabolic Health - Ratings & Reviews - App Store
results.content:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re sorry to hear you’ve had a disappointing experience with Calibrate and a frustrating experience with the app. This is not the experience we seek to provide for our members. In addition to our recent app updates, our team is also working hard to improve our internal processes to help support our members as best as possible. We’re aware the app is not responding to phones with text set to larger font sizes, making it difficult for members to view the entire app screen, select buttons in the Support Center, and therefore log into the app. We know how frustrating this is for our members, and we are rapidly investigating this issue and will share an update on our App Status Page when we have more information. In the meantime, you [...] Wasfieh

  I normally don’t write reviews because I don’t believe it’s worth spending the energy to say something negative. But Calibrate has been so horrible. I feel like it’s my duty to tell people to stay far away from this. The only reason I do it is because it’s a requirement for my insurance, but it’s difficult to get in contact with literally anybody including your care team. It’s difficult to get a refill. Basically everyone there is incompetent. Nobody knows what’s going on and you have to repeat yourself like 12 different times if you’re lucky enough to get a response.Personally, the only thing I like about the app is my coach
 ### Enforced lower quality care

  Alicegar [...] Kritikal Critic

  I’ve been a customer for years. Why? I don’t know I should have quit long ago. Refills take multiple emails, tickets are closed before resolved and the app is fundamentally broken and has been for years. The favorable reviews must be fake. Reading the recent reviews shows this app and service is totally broken. After 3 years of this I finally decided to write a review. (Note-the coaches are great but the program/app/customer service are worse than your cable provider).

  Developer Response

results.title: Calibrate Weight Loss Expert Review
results.content:
A few customers also note frustration with the lack of responsiveness and communication from the company, including difficulties with receiving refunds from customer service.

On the other hand, some online reviewers say that Calibrate offers a simple and effective alternative to other options for weight management. Many report that they experienced successful weight loss after completing the program.

## How it compares with other weight loss programs

Here is a closer look at how Calibrate compares with some other weight loss programs:

## Is Calibrate worth it?

Calibrate may be worth considering for people who have had difficulty losing weight and are looking for a long-term program to help them reach their goals. [...] Furthermore, they have been shown to cause thyroid C‐cell tumors in some animal studies. Therefore, Wegovy and Saxenda are not recommended for people with a personal or family history of medullary thyroid cancer or MEN syndrome (18, 19).

## Customer reviews and brand reputation

As of the time of publication, Calibrate is not accredited by the Better Business Bureau (BBB) and currently holds an F rating, which is based on factors such as the company’s complaint history and business practices (20).

Calibrate also has an average rating of 1.23 out of 5 stars on the BBB website, which is based on 26 customer reviews (20).

Some reviewers report issues with filling prescriptions, which the company states is largely due to a drug shortage that Calibrate has no control over. [...] The program combines diet and lifestyle changes with the use of medications that are FDA-approved for weight management. This may be appealing to those who have tried other approaches in the past without success.

Calibrate might also be a good option for those who find other programs too restrictive, as Calibrate uses a more flexible approach and does not exclude any foods from your diet.

However, the program has a high price tag and is not suitable for everyone, including those who do not meet the eligibility criteria.

Additionally, it might not be a good fit for those who are unsure about committing to a long-term program or hesitant about self-administering daily or weekly injections.

results.title: Addressing the recent Calibrate reviews: We guarantee results, not medication. | Calibrate
results.content:
Calibrate is not immune to these changes—we’ve faced challenges, and spent most of the last year chasing down inventory and insurance approvals for our members. Medication disruptions have served as a source of frustration for patients and providers alike. Bad actors have capitalized on the volatility in this space, selling prescriptions (some of which are not FDA-approved) without any accountability to patient outcomes.

Throughout all of these changes, our North Star has always remained clear: to drive results and empower individuals to make informed decisions about their health.

## Acknowledging Calibrate member complaints: We continue to guarantee results [...] ## Improvements to Calibrate member support

The hurdles and frustrations our members experienced during these transitions—including long response times—are unacceptable, and we have made resolving these issues our number one strategic priority.

We have invested in operational and product improvements and are now confident that we have resolved the underlying drivers of member experience issues and have substantially improved the member experience by every metric. We will continue to improve these metrics and the member experience overall. [...] We remain firmly grounded in our vision. Calibrate is not a quick fix or the path of least resistance to a GLP-1 prescription. We acknowledge that a number of Calibrate reviews are related to medication access—and we remain committed to getting our members access to the tools they need to achieve their goals, even when larger industry challenges lead to slowdowns in prescription coverage and/or availability.

Our approach is centered on delivering real results for our members, and we've stood by this commitment by offering a Results Money Back Promise to every individual who joins our program. The stories you've heard may highlight the challenges of this category, but they do not represent the results we promise and continue to deliver for our members and the category as a whole:

results.title: Calibrate Metabolic Reset For Weight Loss Review
results.content:
Trustpilot also gives Calibrate an average of 3.1 out of 5 stars, based on 119 reviews. One reviewer, who lost 12% of his body weight, rated Calibrate 4 stars and said, “The program has been good for me. It has taught me I need more motivation for water intake and (like most people), I need to work on exercising more.”

A less satisfied customer complained about the customer service, claiming it was nonexistent, and the majority of dissatisfied customers were concerned over not receiving their medications and having difficulty contacting the company.

### Who is a good candidate for Calibrate?
